classes.description: Text chunks extracted from medical documents with semantic chunking

properties.name: content
properties.description: The actual text content of the chunk

properties.name: doc_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the source document

properties.name: doc_title
properties.description: Title of the source document

properties.name: page_num
properties.description: Page number where this chunk appears

properties.name: section_title
properties.description: Title of the section this chunk belongs to

properties.name: section_hierarchy
properties.description: Full section hierarchy (e.g., ['Results', 'Efficacy', 'Primary Endpoint'])

properties.name: chunk_index
properties.description: Sequential index of chunk within the document

properties.name: chunk_type
properties.description: Type of chunk: text, table_summary, figure_description

properties.name: contains_table
properties.description: Whether this chunk references a table

properties.name: contains_figure
properties.description: Whether this chunk references a figure

properties.name: statistical_content
properties.description: Whether this chunk contains statistical data

properties.name: study_id
properties.description: Clinical study identifier

properties.name: study_phase
properties.description: Study phase (e.g., Phase I, Phase II, Phase III)

properties.name: therapeutic_area
properties.description: Therapeutic area (e.g., Oncology, Cardiology)

properties.name: bounding_box
properties.description: Bounding box coordinates as JSON string for citation highlighting

classes.description: Tables extracted from medical documents with structured data

properties.name: summary
properties.description: LLM-generated natural language summary of the table

properties.name: markdown_content
properties.description: Table content in markdown format

properties.name: structured_data
properties.description: Table data as JSON string for structured querying

properties.name: doc_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the source document

properties.name: doc_title
properties.description: Title of the source document

properties.name: page_num
properties.description: Page number where this table appears

properties.name: table_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for this table within the document

properties.name: table_caption
properties.description: Original table caption from the document

properties.name: column_headers
properties.description: List of column headers

properties.name: row_count
properties.description: Number of rows in the table

properties.name: section_title
properties.description: Section where the table appears

properties.name: study_id
properties.description: Clinical study identifier

properties.name: bounding_box
properties.description: Bounding box coordinates as JSON string

classes.description: Figures and charts extracted from medical documents with vision-based descriptions

properties.name: description
properties.description: Vision model-generated description of the figure

properties.name: image_path
properties.description: Path to the extracted image file

properties.name: doc_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the source document

properties.name: doc_title
properties.description: Title of the source document

properties.name: page_num
properties.description: Page number where this figure appears

properties.name: figure_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for this figure within the document

properties.name: figure_caption
properties.description: Original figure caption from the document

properties.name: chart_type
properties.description: Type of chart (e.g., bar, line, scatter, kaplan-meier)

properties.name: section_title
properties.description: Section where the figure appears

properties.name: study_id
properties.description: Clinical study identifier

properties.name: ocr_text
properties.description: OCR-extracted text from the figure

properties.name: bounding_box
properties.description: Bounding box coordinates as JSON string
